title: DocumentTab
description: The content of a tab in a document, containing the body and associated document-level properties.

headers.description: The headers in this tab, keyed by header ID.

footers.description: The footers in this tab, keyed by footer ID.

footnotes.description: The footnotes in this tab, keyed by footnote ID.

lists.description: The lists in this tab, keyed by list ID.

namedRanges.description: The named ranges in this tab, keyed by name.

inlineObjects.description: The inline objects in this tab, keyed by object ID.

positionedObjects.description: The positioned objects in this tab, keyed by object ID.
